Check if F lineage is within the AGT zone 
Based on the paper: Discordance of Species Trees with Their Most Likely Gene Trees (https://journals.plos.org/plosgenetics/article?id=10.1371/journal.pgen.0020068) 


```{julia}
# Define a(x)
function a(x)
    return log( 2/3 + ((3*exp(2x) - 2) / (18*(exp(3x) - exp(2x)))) )
end

# Define b(x)
function b(x)
    return log( 2/3 + ((5*exp(2x) - 2) / (6*(3*exp(3x) - 2*exp(2x)))) )
end

# number of AGTs given x and y
function num_AGTs(x, y)
    ax = a(x)
    bx = b(x)
    print("a(x) = $ax, b(x) = $bx\n")

    if y ≥ ax
        return 0
    elseif y ≥ bx
        return 1
    else
        return 3
    end
end
```

```{julia} 
x = 0.18 
y = 0.17 
num_AGTs(x, y) 
```

```{julia}
x = 0.15
y = 0.17
num_AGTs(x, y) 
```
